templates.name: Cloudflare App Builder
templates.description: An agent that builds full-stack web apps on Cloudflare Workers — React + Vite SPA with a Worker API backend — and ships every project to GitHub. It builds; it does not deploy.

templates.name: Cloudflare CI Engineer
templates.description: An agent that sets up and operates CI/CD for Cloudflare apps from GitHub — gh + wrangler/API with sandbox-exposed credentials, no bespoke tools.

templates.name: Designer
templates.description: A product designer that turns problems into build-ready design specs and critiques UI work — capturing decisions and feedback in GitHub as committed notes and PR/issue comments.

templates.name: Engineer
templates.description: A general-purpose software engineer agent that works GitHub issues across authorized repositories, creates feature branches, and opens pull requests into main.

templates.name: Product Manager
templates.description: Draws the real need out of a request in conversation, then captures it as clear, actionable GitHub issues with gh — following each repo's own templates and labels.

templates.name: Reviewer
templates.description: Reviews open pull requests — reads the change against its issue, runs the repo's checks, and leaves specific, ranked feedback. Reviews; doesn't merge.

templates.name: Technical Writer
templates.description: Writes and maintains a project's documentation — READMEs, guides, references, changelogs — as pull requests, accurate to the code and in the project's own voice.

templates.name: Triage Lead
templates.description: Keeps a GitHub issue backlog healthy — triages, labels, prioritizes, de-duplicates, and assigns work through gh, learning each repo's own taxonomy. Runs on demand or on a schedule.

templates.name: Discord
templates.description: Talk to this agent from Discord — slash-command interactions with signature verification, threaded replies, and typing indicators via eve's discordChannel.

templates.name: GitHub
templates.description: Talk to this agent by @mentioning it in GitHub issue and pull-request comments — a GitHub App with webhook signature verification via eve's githubChannel.

templates.name: Linear
templates.description: Assign and @mention this agent in Linear — it works as a Linear agent, posting Agent Activities on delegated sessions via eve's linearChannel with webhook signature verification.

templates.name: Microsoft Teams
templates.description: Talk to this agent from Microsoft Teams — inbound Bot Framework JWT validation and replies over the Bot Connector API via eve's teamsChannel.

templates.name: Slack
templates.description: Talk to this agent from Slack — app mentions and direct messages with buttons and select menus, credentials brokered by a Vercel Connect connector via eve's slackChannel.

templates.name: Telegram
templates.description: Talk to this agent from Telegram — direct messages and group @mentions with inbound signature verification, replies, and typing indicators via eve's telegramChannel.

templates.name: Twilio (SMS)
templates.description: Talk to this agent over SMS through Twilio — inbound signature verification and outbound replies via eve's twilioChannel, with the allowed sender and from-number read from env.

templates.name: Agent Browser
templates.description: Browser automation with the agent-browser CLI: navigate pages, inspect accessibility snapshots, click/fill by refs, capture screenshots, and run web QA from the sandbox shell.

templates.name: Design critique
templates.description: How to critique a design against its intent — hierarchy, consistency, the unhappy states, accessibility, and copy.

templates.name: Reviewing a pull request
templates.description: How to judge whether a change is correct, safe, and ready — and give feedback that helps the author.

templates.name: Technical writing
templates.description: How to write documentation that gets a reader to an outcome — leading with what they came for and cutting the rest.

templates.name: Triaging issues
templates.description: How to groom a backlog — decide what an incoming issue is, how urgent it is, and what happens to it next.

templates.name: Writing a GitHub issue
templates.description: How to turn a request, bug, or idea into a GitHub issue someone can act on without asking you anything.

templates.name: Writing a PRD
templates.description: A playbook for writing product requirements documents that lead with the decision.

templates.name: Discord Send Message
templates.description: Send a bot-authenticated message to a Discord channel by channel id.

templates.name: Web Search
templates.description: Search and research the live web, returning results and optional page content. Routes through a service that bypasses the bot protection blocking plain fetches, so use it whenever the agent needs to search or read the web.
